name: Leona Gambrel Garage Plan - 14x24 Barn-Style Garage with Loft Potential | DIY Workshop & Storage Building Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a high-capacity roof profile that enhances interior space and visual character.
The 14x24 footprint offers ample room for motorcycles, ATVs, lawn equipment, workshop benches, or compact vehicle storage while still leaving room for organized workspace.
The gambrel roof naturally creates overhead loft potential-perfect for seasonal storage, tool organization, or an elevated storage platform.
Clean framing techniques and practical dimensions make Leona an approachable build for both beginner builders and experienced DIY enthusiasts.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Leona Gambrel Garage - a spacious 14x24 barn-style garage and workshop building designed for efficiency, durability, and timeless architectural appeal. Featuring the classic gambrel roof profile, Leona maximizes interior headroom while delivering the charming look of a traditional barn-inspired structure. With its well-balanced footprint, loft-ready roof design, and DIY-friendly construction, this garage blends practical functionality with eye-cat...
